sketches.mechanism: Receiving from a nil channel blocks forever because a nil channel is never ready.
sketches.resonance: A listener waits perfectly, but the place where a voice should arrive was never made.

sketches.mechanism: A weak reference does not retain its object and is automatically set to nil when the last strong reference leaves scope.
sketches.resonance: What refuses to hold on becomes an absence without needing to say goodbye.

sketches.mechanism: The unreachable statement asserts that control flow cannot arrive there; if it does, safe builds trap.
sketches.resonance: Calling a path impossible does not close it—it only makes arrival violent.
